languages.text: "Прожег плазмой насквозь". {n}Раненый скупо цедит слова.{/n} "Хотел подстеречь и ударить со спины, но мерзавец ждал нападения и успел оставить мне небольшой памятный подарок своей шпагой. Это не спасло его от второго выстрела. Тело сбросил с моста, чтобы не оставлять следов".

"Plasma. Burned straight through." {n}The wounded man grudgingly bites out each word.{/n} "Wanted to catch him unawares and hit him from behind, but the scoundrel was waiting for me — and he managed to leave me a small memento with his sword. That didn't save him from my second shot. I tossed the body off the bridge to avoid leaving any evidence."
languages.original_text: "Прожег плазмой насквозь". {n}Раненый скупо цедит слова.{/n} "Хотел подстеречь и ударить со спины, но мерзавец ждал нападения и успел оставить мне небольшой памятный подарок своей шпагой. Это не спасло его от второго выстрела. Тело сбросил с моста, чтобы не оставлять следов".

That didn't save him from my second shot. I tossed the body off the bridge to avoid leaving any evidence."

languages.text: «Plasma. Lo atravesé por completo». {n}El herido escupe cada palabra con resignación.{/n} «Quería pillarle por sorpresa y le ataqué por la espalda, pero el bellaco me estaba esperando... y consiguió dejarme un recuerdo con su espada. No le salvó de mi segundo disparo. Tiré el cuerpo del puente para no dejar pruebas».
languages.original_text: "Plasma. Burned straight through." {n}The wounded man grudgingly bites out each word.{/n} "Wanted to catch him unawares and hit him from behind, but the scoundrel was waiting for me — and he managed to leave me a small memento with his sword. That didn't save him from my second shot. I tossed the body off the bridge to avoid leaving any evidence."

traits.locale_text: «Plasma. Lo atravesé por completo». {n}El herido escupe cada palabra con resignación.{/n} «Quería pillarle por sorpresa y le ataqué por la espalda, pero el bellaco me estaba esperando... y consiguió dejarme un recuerdo con su espada. No le salvó de mi segundo disparo. Tiré el cuerpo del puente para no dejar pruebas».

languages.text: “等离子。直接烧穿了。”{n}受伤男人咬着牙，不情愿地答道。{/n}“我本想趁其不备从背后下手，结果那混蛋早有准备，还用他的剑给我留了个小纪念。不过他可没躲过我的第二枪。我把尸体从桥上扔下去了，毁尸灭迹。”
languages.original_text: "Plasma. Burned straight through." {n}The wounded man grudgingly bites out each word.{/n} "Wanted to catch him unawares and hit him from behind, but the scoundrel was waiting for me — and he managed to leave me a small memento with his sword. That didn't save him from my second shot. I tossed the body off the bridge to avoid leaving any evidence."

traits.locale_text: “等离子。直接烧穿了。”{n}受伤男人咬着牙，不情愿地答道。{/n}“我本想趁其不备从背后下手，结果那混蛋早有准备，还用他的剑给我留了个小纪念。不过他可没躲过我的第二枪。我把尸体从桥上扔下去了，毁尸灭迹。”

languages.text: « Avec du plasma. Il n'y a rien de tel pour transpercer un homme de part en part. » {n}Les dents serrées, le blessé profère chaque mot à contrecœur.{/n} « J'espérais le surprendre et l'abattre quand il avait le dos tourné, mais ce misérable m'attendait, et il a même réussi à me laisser un petit souvenir à la pointe de son épée. Mais ça ne l'a pas sauvé pour autant, et mon deuxième tir a fait mouche. J'ai jeté le corps du haut de la passerelle de manière à effacer mes traces. »
languages.original_text: "Plasma. Burned straight through." {n}The wounded man grudgingly bites out each word.{/n} "Wanted to catch him unawares and hit him from behind, but the scoundrel was waiting for me — and he managed to leave me a small memento with his sword. That didn't save him from my second shot. I tossed the body off the bridge to avoid leaving any evidence."

traits.locale_text: « Avec du plasma. Il n'y a rien de tel pour transpercer un homme de part en part. » {n}Les dents serrées, le blessé profère chaque mot à contrecœur.{/n} « J'espérais le surprendre et l'abattre quand il avait le dos tourné, mais ce misérable m'attendait, et il a même réussi à me laisser un petit souvenir à la pointe de son épée. Mais ça ne l'a pas sauvé pour autant, et mon deuxième tir a fait mouche. J'ai jeté le corps du haut de la passerelle de manière à effacer mes traces. »

languages.text: "Plazma. Dümdüz yakıp geçti." {n}Yaralı adam, her kelimeyi isteksizce ağzından çıkarıyor.{/n} "Onu gafil avlamak ve arkadan vurmak istemiştim ama alçak herif beni bekliyordu. Kılıcıyla bana küçük bir hatıra bırakmayı başardı. Tabii bu onu ikinci atışımdan kurtarmadı. Kanıt bırakmamak için cesedi köprüden aşağı attım."
languages.original_text: "Plasma. Burned straight through." {n}The wounded man grudgingly bites out each word.{/n} "Wanted to catch him unawares and hit him from behind, but the scoundrel was waiting for me — and he managed to leave me a small memento with his sword. That didn't save him from my second shot. I tossed the body off the bridge to avoid leaving any evidence."

traits.locale_text: "Plazma. Dümdüz yakıp geçti." {n}Yaralı adam, her kelimeyi isteksizce ağzından çıkarıyor.{/n} "Onu gafil avlamak ve arkadan vurmak istemiştim ama alçak herif beni bekliyordu. Kılıcıyla bana küçük bir hatıra bırakmayı başardı. Tabii bu onu ikinci atışımdan kurtarmadı. Kanıt bırakmamak için cesedi köprüden aşağı attım."

languages.text: "Plasma. Hat sich einfach durchgebrannt." {n}Der verwundete Mann presst die Worte nur widerwillig hervor.{/n} "Wollte ihn überraschen und von hinten erwischen, aber der Schurke hatte mich erwartet ... hat mir mit seinem Schwert ein kleines Andenken verpasst. Das hat ihn allerdings nicht vor meinem zweiten Schuss bewahrt. Ich hab die Leiche über die Brücke geworfen, um keine Beweise zu hinterlassen."
languages.original_text: "Plasma. Burned straight through." {n}The wounded man grudgingly bites out each word.{/n} "Wanted to catch him unawares and hit him from behind, but the scoundrel was waiting for me — and he managed to leave me a small memento with his sword. That didn't save him from my second shot. I tossed the body off the bridge to avoid leaving any evidence."

traits.locale_text: "Plasma. Hat sich einfach durchgebrannt." {n}Der verwundete Mann presst die Worte nur widerwillig hervor.{/n} "Wollte ihn überraschen und von hinten erwischen, aber der Schurke hatte mich erwartet ... hat mir mit seinem Schwert ein kleines Andenken verpasst. Das hat ihn allerdings nicht vor meinem zweiten Schuss bewahrt. Ich hab die Leiche über die Brücke geworfen, um keine Beweise zu hinterlassen."

languages.text: 「血漿。貫通した」{n}負傷した男は歯を食いしばって言葉を吐き出す。{/n}「背後から奇襲してやろうとしたが、その野郎は待っていた。剣で小さな記念品を残してくれた。それでも二発目は逃れられなかった。証拠を残さないために遺体を橋から投げ捨てた」
languages.original_text: "Plasma. Burned straight through." {n}The wounded man grudgingly bites out each word.{/n} "Wanted to catch him unawares and hit him from behind, but the scoundrel was waiting for me — and he managed to leave me a small memento with his sword. That didn't save him from my second shot. I tossed the body off the bridge to avoid leaving any evidence."
